entry.title: Configure SAP Gateway service to ignore properties from payload that are not defined
entry.content:
Odata Service payload when implemented 

ex : 

{

"VendorRegistrationRecords": [

{

"Entity1": {

},

"Entity2": {

},

}

 

Due to changes in the partner system, they started sending payloads with 2 additional entities which can not be reverted. 

{

 

How can we ignore the new entity (3 and 4 )which is not available in current SAP OData

"VendorRegistrationRecords": [

{

"Entity1": {

},

"Entity2": {

},

"Entity3": {

},

"Entity4": {

}

}


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Configure SAP Gateway service to ignore properties fr...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

It cannot be ignored, as the requester who sending OData request should know how to use the OData.
We have to remove the wrong entity, to fully work with the OData implementation.

Otherwise we have to change the OData implementation which handles the "unknon" entity.

Best regards,
James

entry.title: Re: Central Invoice Management - Request for information...
entry.content: what property values needs to be passed for ariba.applications.api.key and ariba.applications.realm.id in the Traget system in Cloud Identity

entry.title: COLUMN NAMES STRIPPING AFTER 30 CHARs when replicating SAP HANA DB as source SAP SLT
entry.content:
We are trying to replicate a SAP HANA table as a source using SAP SLT.
We have few column names that are more than 30 chars and SLT strips some of the columns and resulting in some duplicate columns. 

There are SAP Note that are solving a table name more than 30 chars but not COLUMN name. Please response if anyone has faced this issue

entry.title: Re: Finally! we have an open source LLM trained on SAP APIs and ABAP
entry.content:
@MarioDeFelipe Thanks for the info!

Generative or Regurgitative?

I had a play to see if it could generate a program using an example I already had to compare the result; It gave me an exchange between Vikram and Mathew on a similar topic:

I then adjusted the response length and the same prompt then went on to tell me how to debug an ABAP program and create an ABAP program to send an email with an attachment... both unrelated to the prompt.

*Note; I was able to find some use cases where it performed as well or better than other models. Just not code generation.

entry.title: Manual Rating - Performance Form
entry.content:
Hi PMGM Experts,

We have Performance Form with below Route Map -

Employee --> Manager --> Calibration --> Final Review --> Completed

At the Manager Step we are using Manual Rating and Calculated Rating. We have given only Read Only Permission to Manager for Manual Rating and Calculated Rating fields in the Manager Step.

In the Manager Step - Manager rates the Competency and based on that Calculated Rating gets updated in Manager Step. Manual Rating as its ready only shows as Unrated at the Manager Step  screen and when form is moved to next step i.e. Calibration Calculated Rating overwrites Manual Rating.

However if Manager during the Manager Step rates the Competency, saves the form and sends back the form to Employee due to any reason (Calculated Rating overwrites Manual Rating) . After that if employee again send the form to Manager and Manager again rates the Competency, Calculated Rating does get updated with latest value but when this form is send to next step i.e Calibration Manual Rating shows old earlier rating only NOT the latest rating based of Latest Calculated Rating.

Do we know how we can ensure Calculated Rating always overwrites Manual Rating at least till form is with Manager?

I've already reviewed https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2078763

We are using manual-rating="true" override-unrated="true" 

Any leads how to handle this scenario?

entry.title: Re: Withholding Tax in Manage Supplier Line Items
entry.content:
Dear Steffen Riemann,

Thank you for your confirmation.

 

I now understand why it is not possible to display the withholding tax data records in the "Manage Supplier Line Items" list.

Is there another list like "Manage Supplier Line Items" that allows me to check the withholding tax data for supplier line item?

I can check the withholding tax data by checking item details, but I would like to know if there is a way to check it in a list.

 

Best regards

Ayumi

entry.title: Q)DM does not retrieve right Standard Value Key(SVK)'s parameter names from S4Hana Cloud.
entry.content:
Dear Community Members,

I currently have Digital Manufacturing TDD license and have recently integrated it with S4HANA Cloud Demo. Within the Work Centre management application of S4HANA Cloud, I have configured the Standard Value Key (SVK) and input the corresponding SVK values into the Operations of the Routing.

 

However, upon downloading the relevant order into Digital Manufacturing (DM), the parameter names for the SVK appear incorrectly, showing as "SAP_01" and similar labels. Furthermore, it seems their value is also wrong.

 

Could anyone advise on what configuration I might have missed that is causing these incorrect results?

 

+++ Additional Question+++

In addition to the issue mentioned above, I am facing another problem. I would appreciate your assistance with if possible.

In my case, when an order is downloaded from S4HANA Cloud to DM, it creates its BOM and routing in DM. So now, there are too many BOMs and routings in DM. I would like to be sure whether this situation is natural and aware why the system does like this.

++++++

 

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

 

Best regards,

Wonpyo

SAP Digital Manufacturing SAP HANA Cloud

entry.title: Re: FI - Upload supllier accountting document - Cloud Public

entry.title: Deconsolidation & posting change warning message - Bin not relevant
entry.content:
Hello All, 

I am currently performing a Deconsolidation task with POSC setup and in WPT i did not mention destination bin but after the decon activity the HU are moved back from work center to GR stagging area, I used /n/scwm/post to move the HU from F1 stock type to F2 by giving a destination bin

SAP throwing a warning message- " Stotr. bin assignment only relevant for posting change with Physical inventory" 

Could you please help me with this error.

entry.title: monitoring alert when specific users such as FF , DDIC or SAP* log in SAP
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any way to setup monitoring alert when specific users such as FF , DDIC or SAP* log into the managed SAP system .

Please advice

Regards

 

Nilanjan Ghosh 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: monitoring alert when specific users such as FF , DDI...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

In our standard template SAP ABAP 7.10 and higher, there is no metric used to monitor the logon action for user such as FF , DDIC or SAP*.

However, we deliver one standard metric/alert: User Lock Status which allows to set a list of ABAP users that are checked for their lock status in the system.

You can define multiple variants for the users you want to monitor as following:

custom metric variant: USER=FF
custom metric variant: USER=DDIC
custom metric variant: USER=SAP*

If the user got locked the status will be red then you can get alerts. If the user not locked, the rating will be green and you can also check the status in System Monitoring UI.

Please let me know if this metric meets your requirement.

Best regards,

Ava

entry.title: When SAC using Live Data Model that from HANA CLOUD notice Not authorized
entry.content:
SAP Analytics Cloud  SAP HANA Cloud 

Hello,

I have created a Live Data Model. However, when I attempt to use it in a story, I receive an error message stating that I am not authorized. What steps should I take to resolve this issue? Is there anything specific I need to do within the HANA Cloud ?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to realize the line data access control in SAP Analytics Cloud?
entry.content: I mean the row-level data access control, each user can only see the records that match the hierarchy values he/she is authorized.

entry.title: Custom Logic - Sales Document Item Check - Messages
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In Custom Fields Fiori app under Custom Logic, I implemented "Sales Item Check" BADI under Business Context Sales: Sales Document Item.

Purpose was to validate some Custom fields from Additional Data A tab on the Sales Order in the BADI in method CHECK_FIELDS

The way to raise an error message in this BADI method is to fill messages parameter table like below

 

append value #( messagetype = 'E' messagetext = 'Value missing for field YY1_FIELD_SDI.'  ) to messages.

 

 
The raised message then goes into VA01/VA02 log (accessed by clicking CTRL+SHIFT+F2)
 
 
The Log button on Clicking will show the error message like below

Now the issue I am facing is, even if the Error is corrected on the Item, the message in the log still remains. We can only append new message in the messages table of the BADI method but there is nothing in the documentation about how to remove an existing error message from the log

How, can we remove the message from the log once we find the error is resolved?

Best regards

entry.title: Re: PIR Consumption & Reduction Mechanism
entry.content: Great explanation!  This step-by-step guide is really useful.

Hi

It was solved, we just change the selection parameter in MRP run but we didn't find actual solution, can we meet on teams or zoom to understand the process, if you have free time.

entry.title: Re: Report stories - Recruiting doesn't show in available...
entry.content: Under Reports permission ---> Create Story please check if permission is provided for Recruiting schema

entry.title: The Procurement Monthly - August 2024
entry.content:
Summary

This month we seem to have 2 main themes, Gen AI, its promise and trajectory, with the position on the annual hype cycle moving forward at a rapid pace. There may be disconnects in what these types of reports v practitioner application however with some reports stating the pace of change and adoption is a little slower due to data, and also risk aversion.

The other area is around SRM. The benefits have been made several times before, but the importance is interesting. I noted in this years Economist report the general falling of importance (I think due largely to the inflation issues still impacting many (when cash crunches come in, many other things go out!). But what’s fascinating to me is to get the suppliers view of this, and there are 2 stats which jumped out, from World CC 77% of suppliers don’t believe procurement when they talk about relationships being important, and from HICX where suppliers stated more than 10 systems are required to service a customer. It will be interesting to see how these are addressed if SRM is to deliver on its promise.

HICX Supplier Survey

Our first 2 reports look at the Buyer Seller relationship. First from HICX their study covered 1000 suppliers who supply mainly large enterprise customers. There were some very interesting findings. 48% said their most important customer could improve its communication significantly, and 31% have to log into 10 more systems to do business with them.

61% said their most important customer sends them too many information requests and 46% said their most important customer can be unpleasant to work with.

All in all, this identifies some areas about how easy some companies are to do business with as opposed to others and should give some ideas about either what goes into supplier surveys when procurement carries them out or areas to look into to see how they compare.

Speaking of which….

World CC Effective Relationship Management

This report covers some 400 organisations on both buy and sell side supplemented with interviews and discussion groups. As usual from World CC its an interesting read, and a well carried out piece of research.

According to the report there is broad consensus that effective Relationship Management and increased collaboration in B2B settings are key drivers for mutual success. 80% of suppliers and customers confirm that when Relationship Management is effectively executed, it yields substantial benefits.

In spite of clear benefits, there is a notable shortfall in the execution of Relationship Management. This is recognized by most of the buyer community and contributes to a high degree of scepticism in the supplier community, where 77% question the sincerity of customers truly wanting to collaborate.

77% - Wow. That is a concern, its basically saying 77% of suppliers don’t believe procurement when broader discussions around longevity and building the relationship is said, which ultimately leads to a lack of trust. This scepticism is driven by past experience, and it shows the work that procurement will need to do to continue to build that trust.

Its interesting that in a separate piece of research that SAP sponsored with the university of Tennessee the 5 dimensions of trust includes communication and recognising the differing viewpoints of both parties.

Some other key takeaways of the study include that 55% of respondents stated they actually carried out a voice of the supplier survey (see the HICX report for some ideas on questions to ask!) and 40% of buy side said they didn’t do any SRM activity.

CIPS Global State of Procurement

This is CIPS first global procurement study, and draws on information from 122 responses and whilst a little UK centric (45% of respondents) still some interesting findings.

Biggest spend influence areas are still the typical indirect spend with over 70% identifying Office supplies, FM, professional services, IT and MRO capital and travel as the major areas of spend influence. Interesting recruitment and contingent labour came close as well with about 65% identifying procurements involvement there.

From an operating model perspective, 68% stated that the function was either centralised or centre led, and headcount is forecasted to remain relatively static.

And as a lead into the tech section (!) 35% identified that their organisations planned to invest more in AI with 30% investing in cyber security measures.

Gartner Hype Cycle

 

This year’s hype cycle has been released and in surprising news (!) the continual rise of Gen Ai continues, in fact according to the cycle despite the hype, the plateau of productivity (the part at which it becomes mainstream and deployed fully) is achievable in 2 years.

Gartner’s Hype Cycle for Procurement and Sourcing Solutions evaluated more than 20 technologies impacting the procurement landscape in 2024. This year, many core procurement technologies, such as source-to-pay suites and supplier information management, are climbing the Slope of Enlightenment toward the Plateau of Productivity, or mainstream adoption. All of these technologies are expected to reach the plateau within two to five years.

Some notable changes including Conversational AI being identified as unable to reach the end stage as Gen AI will overtake it and deliver its use cases, and intake and orchestration being separated and identified separately on the cycle. Gartner defines orchestration “platforms are decision augmentation tools that prescribe and execute end-to-end source-to-pay process workflows to fulfill specific business outcomes” and intake as “improves end-user experience by navigating preconfigured process workflows”.

Overall, I personally think the hype cycle is a decent indicator of where broader tech deployment is heading.

Gartner Gen AI

IN the next few papers, we will look specifically at AI in procurement, especially as the hype cycle sees it as maturing within the next 2 years!

In this paper Gartner looks at the plans for use cases, benefits, and expected adoption of AI in procurement. A majority of procurement organizations have plans to implement at least one-use case of generative AI over the next 12 months. Despite concerns around data, risk, and unproven ROI, plans for pilots proceed with 15% of organizations having already implemented.

In terms of benefits the report identifiers that procurement leaders expect a 22.7% increase in productivity and 12.5% cost savings over the next 12-18 months from generative AI, with use cases planned for Sourcing and CLM, Supplier information discovery and management, and communications.

Procurement Leaders AI

Procurement leaders broadly agrees in terms of the progress made in deployment, with 53% having preliminary exploration, and just under 7% already deploying however a word of caution springs from the change with the report starting that the pace of change is slow, with many functions reporting they are being held back by problems with their data, funding and skills.

When they do change however, the benefits are lower (than Gartner’s thoughts) in terms of non-productivity, with 36% identifying no impact on effectiveness, and 56% a limited impact. The use cases differ slightly too, with Spend analysis, market intelligence and category management leading the way in terms of systems with an AI component.

AQPC RPA in Supply chain

In other non-Gen AI news now! APQC gathered insights from 310 supply chain professionals about RPA (robotic Process automation) within their supply chains and here is what they found.

Organizations are prioritizing the implementation of RPA across all areas in supply chain, 20% of sourcing and procurement organisations have already implemented with 62% likely to implement. Benefits include improved quality (61%), Improved efficiency (56%) and reduced risk (48%)

Hackett Gen AI & Operating Models

According to The Hackett Group’s analysis, Gen AI can yield a 47% reduction in procurement function costs and a 54% human productivity increase over five to seven years. With Gen AI being a driving force to rethink the operating model as this has the potential to remove manual tasks and transactional activity, freeing up resources to focus on more strategic, value-added activities.

Its this refocus, which according to Hackett makes those changes to the function costs and therefore productivity as well.

 

 

 

As always reach out to discuss more, and always happy to hear your thoughts!

entry.title: Re: Recruiting - scheduling table reports
entry.content: For the reports scheduled from report center owner of the schedule can alone download the report from "My Jobs" section, users that are added as recipients can only get the notification about the start and completion of the schedule.

entry.title: Re: Tracing call-off purchase orders negotiated savings
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use the condition supplements to add required discount conditions in the contract, so that it will be copied to call off automatically.

In ME32K, select the item and click on conditions button. Then maintain the required discount conditions. The same shall be done at header level as well.

Regards,

entry.title: Some questions about S4Core 108
entry.content:
While operating in S4Core 108, I have met some questions.
 
1.I want to transport migration project from DEV 100 to DEV 110(different clients in one system). I tried two methods but both failed.
 
   1.1 I use the method "goto - use project in different client" in LTMOM,but failed.error message is  "Project is already assigned to the current client".(already choose the development package newly created instead of $TMP)
 
   1.2 I use LTMOM to add the migration project to the TR in DEV 100,but when l try to use SCC1N to transport it to DEV110, failed. the message said "Before Export Phase Failed. Please check Log for Details"(I am sure that the migration project is fully included in the TR, and the TR is newly created and don't include other conception. Already use SM12 to check and found no table locked in username.Already use SU53 to check and found no authorization lack.)
 
 
2.Another question is about "import financial plan data". I use it to upload project cost plan instead of CJ40. but fiscal year is mandatory,then how can i upload the overall cost of project?
 
3.And i found that the fiscal year data needs to be maintained in OKEQ CO version 0,but my upload data's plan version is P01. So why is the fiscal year data controlled by version 0's configuration instead of version P01's configuration?
 
4.What' more, I also found that WBS must be marked as Statistical, then the fiacal year can be controlled by config OKEQ. If WBS not be marked as Statistical, the fiacal year can be any year and out of control.  Why does this need to be associated with WBS attributes "Statistical"?

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Strategy - End-to-end business processes deep dives - NEW eBook available
entry.content: Thank you for share such nice document!

entry.title: Re: Service and Asset Manager - notficiation type not appearing
entry.content:
Where exactly are they not appearing? Are you creating them on the client and they are not appearing on the list or are you creating them on the backend and expecting them in the client?
Please also mention the persona you are using along with the metadata version.
For the FST persona, the types are filtered using UserObjectType. Check the ServiceNotificationTypesQueryOption.js rule.

entry.title: Re: How can I clear the WIP balance in TECO production or...
entry.content: "The 'Manage Event-Based Posting Errors - Product Costing' app is just a view-only screen. Should I use the app below instead? 'Postprocess Event-Based Postings - Product Costing'"

entry.title: Re: How can I find a freight Order that has multiple Sale...
entry.content:
One fool-proof way would be to to write an SQL query via SQ00, where you can check the TOR_ITEM table, with item category = PRD, and the base business document contains the sales order number. You can then in ALV grid display just do a unique count of the column. 

Other way, not foolproof, would be to use the TORROT label field. usually this field will contain the sales order/delivery number if there is only unique sales order/delivery/trq.

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: My solution.

entry.title: Re: SAP RE-FX: % Share in Source Condition when the sourc...
entry.content:
Hi,

The calculation formula 'E2 % Share in Source Condition' uses the source condition's amount for its calculation.

In your case, the sales-based rent condition is the source, which uses the calculation formula "U." This will not work because the formula "U" does not calculate the condition amount instead, it serves as a technical parameter for the sales-based settlement.

Please use a source condition that calculates the condition amount.

Best regards,

Achyuth reddy.

entry.title: Re: Activate "Self Registration form" SAP IAS

Hi Berubean,

You can use BUS1505_CHANGE to update/Create valuation parameter in the contract.

Achyuth.

entry.title: No projects available for my Desktop Agent
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to re-use an automation scenario from store(SAP Build Process Automation).I have followed the steps https://help.sap.com/docs/IRPA_S4HANA/144f48c43d774333b158cf83044967fa/567290119cdb41d691d530c0639d2201.html, but at step 5, I do not see any projects in my agent, neither 'start' / 'record' button being visible at the agent. The agent is connected and visible in SAP Build Process Automation -> Environment -> Agents.. Projects are visible at Environment -> Projects.

Not sure,

whether 'service state' is anything to do with this problem (or)

mismatch of version at agent vs project is the problem (or)

anything to do with trigger condition ???

Any help will be appreciated!! Thanks in advance!!

SAP Build Process Automation @Archana @vipin_Ojha

entry.title: Re: Step Into Autonomy: Introduction to Configuration Manager
entry.content:
Hi ,

Informative blog . 

Regards ,

entry.title: Re: How to pass header and line item xml body to the CPI...
entry.content:
Hi @Akash 

In CPI (Cloud Platform Integration), you can manage multiple headers and line items based on your specific requirements. Here are two examples to illustrate how you might handle these:

1. Data Transformation: If you need to transform or manipulate data from headers and line items, CPI provides options to use message mapping. This allows you to customize how data is processed and formatted.

2. Custom Logging: If your goal is to include header and line-item information in a custom header for logging purposes in message monitoring, you can achieve this using Groovy or JavaScript scripts. These scripting options let you tailor the logging to fit your needs.

Could you please clarify your specific requirements so we can assist you more effectively?

Regards,

AK

SAP Integration Suite | Fiori | ABAP Architect

entry.title: Re: UPDATE statement delete rows
entry.content:
You need the full row as it was before in your Work Area (the variabel structure you are updating from). Like this where data is read into Work Area before updating:

DATA wa TYPE scustom.
SELECT SINGLE *
       FROM scustom
       WHERE id = '00017777'
       INTO @wa.
wa-discount = '003'.
UPDATE scustom FROM @wa.

Otherwise you need to update specific field with this:

UPDATE <table> set <FIELDNAME> = 'xxx'
where key1 eq xxx
and    key2 eq yyy...

entry.title: Re: Is it impossible to connect by client when connecting...
entry.content:
No, there are no client dependent RFC server registrations - not even SAP system dependent ones.
RFC request dispatching for registered servers is only done via gateway host and program ID parameters.

entry.title: Moving Average Price control
entry.content:
Hello,

We are currently migrating to SAP, part of the migrating is taking over the inventory values for materials. Most of the material types will have a price control "Moving Average". However, for a considerable amount of materials the current price is missing. Besides manual enrichment, has anyone ever encountered this situation and had a more time efficient approach to this problem? 

Thanks!

#materialmaster

entry.title: Re: A standard function module is overwriting my logic in...
entry.content:
You can use a Business Transaction Event in the end of the posting. 

Tcode FIBF

It´s a bit tricky until you get the drill, but basically you wil lhave to find the right BTE, create a Function Module and code it. Create a Product (and activate) and assign the FM to the Product.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics cloud not all filter elements are displ...
entry.content:
Hi 07makita, 

  Is it possible that this keyfigure has no booked data? Can you try to switch on the setting( second checkbox on top left) and try again? 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Need career guidance
entry.content:
Dear team,

Good day

I have been working as an administrative coordinator for a mechanical construction company since 2019, and I did my BE in 2006. Now I want to switch to an IT job at the age of 40. Please advise on studying SAP and which module will have more job scope in the future.

I am eagerly looking forward to your advice, team.

Thanks

Bharathidasan Murugesan

entry.title: Re: In SAC Hyperlink feature, is there a way to reach a s...
entry.content: As far as I know this is not possible.

entry.title: Re: How can I clear the WIP balance in TECO production or...
entry.content: Yes, if there is error, you need to solve the error and reprocess.

entry.title: Re: Can I share private version to group of users (teams) in SAC planning?
entry.content: I guess it's not supported...

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to realize the line data access contro...
entry.content: Yes, you can achieve that in SAC via Data access control, check this help page for detail: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/b46f2f74aea04c399ccb5c9b1bcc225e.html?q=data%20access%20control

entry.title: Re: Service and Asset Manager - notficiation type not appearing
entry.content:
Hello,

where did you set the Notification Types in Syclo?

There are two oMDOs where you can set types for Notifications:

  • SAMXXXX_NOTIFICATION_GENERIC: Here you can set which Notifs you want to read/show on the SSAM from the backend - defined with an assignment type
  • SAMXXXX_NOTIF_TYPE: Here you can set which Notification types should be visibile on Notification create page

Regards

Björn

entry.title: Status ZU G of the user interface SAPLSVIM missing....how we can resolve this
entry.content:
GETTING THE ABOVE SUBJECT ERROR WHILE PRACTICING ....

HOW CAN WE RESOLVE THIS ERROR

entry.title: Error APIMGT100: Activation of API Management capability has failed
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

I am getting error while activating API Management Capability in Integration Suit of Trail account . 

"Error APIMGT100: Activation of API Management capability has failed".
 
Deleted Integration Suit subscription and created again but same error is popping up .. other capabilities are getting added .
 
pls advise . 
 
API Management

entry.title: Re: Change Phantom Bom Alt

Greetings,

if you are using production versions try to follow the link below. It should work.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/boms-alternative-phantom-components-and-production-orders/qaq-p/11636231

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: will incomplete TECO of a production order impact MRP ??
entry.content: I have a situation where i have list of production orders where TECO is not completed when MRP runs its picks up the demand and shows in correct call-off - can some one help to understand this issue. in my view if the Teco is not completed the demand should be reflecting for all the parts in that production order

entry.title: SAP webi formula to calculate the hours and minutes between two dates
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there a more accurate formula for calculating the difference between two dates in hours and minutes in SAP web intelligence?

I need to determine the time difference between two dates. For instance, given the following dates:

- date1: 07/06/2024 09:52:17 PM
- date2: 07/07/2024 02:25:39 AM

The correct difference is 4:33, but the formula I used yielded a result of 5:01. Can you suggest a better formula to get the correct result?

 

=((((ToNumber(Substr(FormatDate([Performed Date & Time] ; "HH:mm:ss") ; 1 ;2 ) ) * 60 *60+ToNumber(Substr(FormatDate([Order Date & Time] ; "HH:mm:ss") ; 4 ;2) ) * 60 +ToNumber(Substr(FormatDate([Performed Date & Time]; "HH:mm:ss") ; 7 ;2 ) )) - (ToNumber(Substr(FormatDate([Order Date & Time] ; "HH:mm:ss") ; 1 ;2 ) ) * 60 *60+ToNumber(Substr(FormatDate([Order Date & Time] ; "HH:mm:ss") ; 4 ;2) ) * 60 +ToNumber(Substr(FormatDate([Order Date & Time] ; "HH:mm:ss") ; 7 ;2 ) ) ))) / 60 + (DaysBetween([Order Date & Time]; [Performed Date & Time]) * 24 * 60) ) / 60

 

Regards.

entry.title: RABAX error on sap gui logon
entry.content:
Hi,

How to fix error during sap gui logon.
No updates been made on server, and upon checking of R3trans -d, no error also.
Upon checking on other system via SM59 then remote sap logon to system having "Rabax during sap gui logon"
on Transaction: ST22 there's a lot of errors
- Runtime Error: DBSQL_SQL_ERROR
- Exception: CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB

via server command line, we already executed the R3Trans - d command with no error.
for the db space, there's still a lot of space.

What should we do next to fix the error?


Thank You

entry.title: How to create a list of SAP HANA parameters
entry.content:
I am creating a list of SAP HANA parameters.
It seemed like a good idea to use the SYS.M_INIFILE_CONTENTS view to reference all the currently set HANA parameters at once.

This SYS.M_INIFILE_CONTENTS view exists in both systemDB and TenantDB, and each contains different information.

For example, if you search for LAYER_NAME = 'SYSTEM' in the SYS.M_INIFILE_CONTENTS view in TenantDB, several parameters will be found, and if you similarly search the SYS.M_INIFILE_CONTENTS view in SystemDB, several different parameters will be found.

Also, if you search the SYS.M_INIFILE_CONTENTS view by narrowing down the KEY to one, data for the three LAYER_NAMEs "DEFAULT", "SYSTEM", and "DATABASE" will be returned as results.

When creating a parameter list for SAP HANA, how should I organize the SYS.M_INIFILE_CONTENTS views in systemDB and TenantDB?

entry.title: Re: PO Collaboration with Central Procurement and the Ari...
entry.content: As your looking to integrate S/4 HANA Central Procurement Hub solution with Ariba Network by sending the Purchase Order Output via EDI channel. This new integration scenario or new scope item (6BJ) is currently under development, and we are planning to release it in the upcoming release tentatively*. To know the right release timelines, we would suggest you check the SAP Roadmap explorer.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere OData service
entry.content: Please refer the document below: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/43509d67b8b84e66a30851e832f66911/7a453609c8694b029493e7d87e0de60a.html#parameters

entry.title: Causes leading to widespread property changes in SAP Fiori screens
entry.content:
Context - 

We have observed lot of property changes in SAP Fiori screen in S4 regression system which has caused failure to Automated regression suite over the weekend while executing for MTP.

These changes have necessitated substantial modifications (70-80%) to the automation scripts to prevent further failures. 

These property changes include:

Old

property for field to enter Tcode = Enter Transaction code (upper case T)

New

property for field to enter Tcode = Enter transaction code (lower case t)

Close button on SAP Fiori Screen got unmapped from scripts because it had property as Link earlier and now it is changed to Button.

Similar way there were many properties which got changed and would be difficult to summarize here.

 

Questions -

What could have caused these widespread property changes in SAP Fiori screens? Are there any recent updates, upgrades, or configuration changes that might have triggered this, and the reason how these upgrades led to these property changes?

Additionally, what are the recommended best practices for handling such UI changes in automation scripts to minimize their impact on regression testing?

entry.title: Re: Sales in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2005
entry.content:
Dear Experts

I want to know in Import Sales Order template, is it possible to make an optional field mandatory, Please confirm & if possible then how to do the same

Thanks

Rahul Singhal

entry.title: No of Same Work Center
entry.content:
Hi all,

My client's requirement is like this

the client has 7 lathe machines on the shop floor sometimes he uses one lathe machine for one order, sometimes he uses two lathe machines, sometimes he uses all lathe machines for one order. sometimes he uses 1,2,3 for one order and 4,5,6,7 for another order, the client does not want to have  7 different work centers due to more no of production versions and routing.

He wants to group them all into one and use them based on req.

Is there any possible solution for this if there please help.

Thanks 

Raviram

entry.title: Re: Sales in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition – Automated Order Process with SAP´s Intelligent Tech
entry.content:
In Import Sales Order App, is it possible to change the field property from optional to mandatory, if yeh then how

Thanks 

Rahul Singhal

entry.title: Re: Testfalldesign für SAP Applikationen
entry.content:

entry.title: Re: PM Data Migration from ECC to S4 Hana
entry.content: Thanks a lot Vaibhav for the valuable information .

entry.title: Re: Certification for Partner AI Apps on SAP BTP – Ensuring Reliability, Responsibility, and Relevan
entry.content:
Hi Cocquerel, 

Referring to these documentations (listed below) could be good alternatives of 'AI Dev Guide' in my opinion. these are publicly available documentations for customer as well.

AI For Application Development | AI Foundation in SAP BTP

SAP AI Core | SAP Help Portal

Artificial Intelligence | SAP Help Portal

Responsible AI --> AI Ethics policy guide and handbook

What is the SAP BTP Guidance Framework? | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: S/4 Hana Cloud Public - Invoice Bloking
entry.content:
Hello,

Kindly refer below.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/block-all-supplier-invoices-in-s-4hana-public-cloud/qaq-p/12651097 

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2843091 

You can also set the payment block using BAdI FIN_ACDOC_VALIDATION.

Best Regards,

Vijayendra

Can we count the number of clicks on specific links through service now campaigns?

entry.title: Re: Where are Tcode that are deprecated in S/4 and a new one that added to S/4 HANA?
entry.content: Is it only transaction codes, or any minor/major change in existing transaction codes? Why transaction codes only? The only way I know is just to keep you informed via "what's new" blog posts, documentation, etc.

entry.title: Is there any filter for Q&A community by SAP products?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Now the new community has been launched, but the questions in Q&A can't be easily identified by different SAP products, for example: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, etc., so it brings efforts to determine which product the questions are coming from, since I am only focusing on S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and other colleagues may focus on ECC, S/4HANA OP.

So it is better to add a mandatory field when posting a question to identity the specific SAP products. it can be identity which product belongs to from the default page. see screenshot below

 

Br, Bob

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Flexibility: Adapting UIs for Specific User Roles
entry.content: @RaminS : Yes, by setting authorization on cards, you can ensure that a user only sees cards from an application for which they have the proper authorization. Please follow this documentation for more details.

entry.title: SAP Unable to Preview and Save as PDF
entry.content:
Hi Expert

need help to resolved this issue on user account

note:  we created user on Windows Server and user is connecting via RDP on server.

          Other user account has no issue on pdf preview only this particular user

when we try to preview the PDF on SAP Client and it show this the below error 

"Could not find a part of the path 'C:\Users\user5\AppData\Local\Temp\24\B1CRPROXY_CONNSTR_0000E334_0.tmp'."
 
Thank you for your help
Zernan

entry.title: Unauthorized Error When Accessing SAP Product API from Browser
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm able to access the product API in the SAP client gateway, but when I try to access it from the browser, it prompts for a username and password. After entering my SAP username and password, I receive an "unauthorized" error. Can anyone help with this issue? Any suggestions would be helpful.
